com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service

Interface BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback

  • Enclosing class:
    BluetoothService

    public static interface BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onConnectionIsNotEstablished()
      Will be called when connection is not established.
      void onInfoReceived(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.DeviceInfo deviceInfo, java.util.List<com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork> candidateNetworks)
      Will be called when info is received from the device.
      void onOperationTimeLimitExceeded()
      Will be called when BT operation time limit is exceeded.

    • Method Detail

      • onConnectionIsNotEstablished

        void onConnectionIsNotEstablished()
        Will be called when connection is not established. Make sure that BluetoothService.connectToDeviceViaBluetooth(String, Context, BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback) has been called.

      • onInfoReceived

        void onInfoReceived(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.DeviceInfo deviceInfo,
                    java.util.List<com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork> candidateNetworks)
        Will be called when info is received from the device.
        Parameters:
        deviceInfo -
        candidateNetworks - List of visible networks.

      • onOperationTimeLimitExceeded

        void onOperationTimeLimitExceeded()
        Will be called when BT operation time limit is exceeded.
